text: The model answered quickly and the response was clear.
The endpoint was expensive when I forgot to delete it overnight.
Batch transform finished the offline inference job without keeping a server alive.
I could not find the CloudWatch logs at first, but the training job itself completed.
The notebook instance stayed running longer than expected.
S3 artifacts made it easy to inspect the processed data and model output.
The IAM role was confusing because local credentials and job execution credentials are different.
Serverless inference is useful for traffic that is not constant.
The job failed because the input channel path was wrong.
Using VS Code locally feels better than opening a cloud notebook for every small edit.
